purpose: Defines what is live, scaffolded, and blocked before production activation.

blocked_until_final_activation.reason: Review and apply only after final activation approval.
Redirect URLs, RLS, and user flow must be tested first.
Provider, pricing, refund policy, webhook verification, and compliance must be finalized.
Requires private storage, explicit image consent, deletion policy, MIME/size validation, and admin review.
Requires reviewed calculation method, source registry approval, and output guardrails.
Requires login, active subscription, user consent, approved Knowledge Vault rules, and reviewed calculation method.
Requires protected admin auth, role enforcement, service-role route, and audit logging.
Requires provider selection, rate limits, source reliability check, and clear live/curated labeling.

non_negotiable_guards: Do not expose Supabase service role key in frontend.
Do not enable anonymous backend writes.
Do not store card details in Drishvara database.
Do not display unreviewed mantra text.
Do not claim guaranteed health, wealth, marriage, job, success, or lifespan outcomes.
Do not publish user submissions without explicit permission.
Do not enable palm image upload without private storage and explicit consent.
